commands.review_summary:
This PR updates `probeGateway()` to await a bounded gateway client close drain before resolving and adds regression tests for ordered teardown plus fallback cleanup.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +66. Total +73 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main requests `client.stop()` and resolves immediately, while the existing client close path is asynchronous. I did not run a failing production CLI repro in this read-only review.
